description: Wire the six Claude Code host events to `super-skill capture` so real sessions accumulate into super-skill's redacted WAL (needed for `super-skill mine`). capture reads the hook JSON on stdin and never fails the session. Requires the `super-skill` CLI on PATH (uv tool install super-skill-cli / pipx install super-skill-cli). If your Claude Code build does not auto-load plugin hooks, run `super-skill hooks-config` and merge its output into settings.json instead.
